day_1.html.content:
let
    Source = Excel.CurrentWorkbook(){[Name="LensData"]}[Content],
    #"Promoted Headers" = Table.PromoteHeaders(Source, [PromoteAllScalars=true]),
    #"Changed Type" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Promoted Headers",{{"Date", type datetime}, {"Line", type text}, {"Result", type text}}),
    ChangedType = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Changed Type",{
    {"Date", type date},
    {"Line", type text},
    {"Result", type text}
    }),
    Filtered = Table.SelectRows(ChangedType, each [Result] = "OK")
in
    Filtered
Code bài tập tương tự như code

let
    Source = Excel.CurrentWorkbook(){[Name="LensData"]}[Content],
    #"Promoted Headers" = Table.PromoteHeaders(Source, [PromoteAllScalars=true]),
    ChangedType = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Promoted Headers",{
    {"Date", type date},
    {"Line", type text},
    {"Result", type text}
    }),
    FilteredNG = Table.SelectRows(ChangedType, each [Result] = "OK")
in
    FilteredNG
